case_title: FABULOUS HOMES/OPTIMAL DESIGN GROUP VS SILVESTRE & SONS IRONWORKS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY FABULOUS HOMES/OPTIMAL DESIGN GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT SILVESTRE & SONS IRONWORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SILVESTRE & SONS IRONWORKS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FABULOUS HOMES/OPTIMAL DESIGN GROUP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SILVESTRE & SONS IRONWORKS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
